Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Dangerous Head", "cost": ["Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "20+", "text": "If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Basic Pokémon, this attack does 50 more damage."}, {"name": "Hammer In", "cost": ["Darkness", "Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 3, "damage": "90", "text": ""}]
Attack_Texts: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Basic Pokémon, this attack does 50 more damage.|
FlavorText: It pulls up its shed skin to protect itself while it kicks. The bigger the crest, the more respected it is.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Stampede", "cost": ["Darkness"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "10", "text": ""}, {"name": "Ram", "cost": ["Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "20", "text": ""}]
FlavorText: It changes so it looks like its foe, tricks it, and then uses that opportunity to flee.

Attack_Texts: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.|Attach a Darkness Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
FlavorText: When this legendary Pokémon's wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures.

Abilities: [{"name": "Scoundrel Guard", "text": "Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon by your opponent's Pokémon-GX or Pokémon-EX.", "type": "Ability"}]
Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Super Psy Bolt", "cost": ["Darkness", "Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 3, "damage": "80", "text": ""}]
FlavorText: In its true form, it possess a huge amount of power. Legends of its avarice tell how it once carried off an entire castle to gain the treasure hidden within.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Dragon Pulse", "cost": ["Lightning"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "40", "text": "Discard the top 2 cards of your deck."}, {"name": "Sky Judgment", "cost": ["Fire", "Lightning", "Lightning", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 4, "damage": "190", "text": "Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon."}]
Attack_Texts: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck.|Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon.
FlavorText: It lives in the ozone layer far above the clouds and cannot be seen from the ground.

Abilities: [{"name": "Fabled Defense", "text": "As long as this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, prevent all damage done to your Benched Pokémon by your opponent's attacks.", "type": "Ability"}]

Attack_Texts: This attack does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
FlavorText: According to the legends of Sinnoh, this Pokémon emerged from an egg and shaped all there is in this world.
